primary: Add upload-image-to-recipe endpoint using OpenAI Vision; must handle security: rate-limit, magic-byte MIME check, prompt injection mitigation, no LLM response in logs

hypotheses.summary: User wants a single-image POST /api/recipes/create/image endpoint that calls OpenAI Vision and persists the returned Recipe, with the 10-item security checklist enforced (size cap, real-MIME sniff, UUID temp file, per-user/hour rate-limit, 60s timeout, prompt-injection guard, immediate temp-file cleanup, no raw-LLM leakage to client OR logs).
